5:
You signal your readiness to Maxio, and he uses his “clever trick” to turn you invisible. Track down the touched sylph and use the stolen scalebomb to give him a taste of his own medicine.

※The spell of invisibility will only last for a limited time. Find and touch the sweet-smelling wildflower to extend the duration of the enchantment.

63:
If you can get the scouts back on their feet, they may be able to point you towards your companions.
Oh, and be on your guard. If this operation is to succeed, we can ill afford any further mishaps.
